2120290.name: Fantasy Grounds - Devin Night Token Pack 152: Deadly Draconians
2120290.description:
Devin Night Token Pack 152: Deadly Draconians

Deadly Draconians, a race of humanoid dragons are poised to descend into your campaign! This pack contains 24 tokens with various weapons, from mighty flamberges, enchanted staves, and magical maces, to traditional sword and board style melee choices, you're sure to find a foe fit to face your most fearsome heroes!
This token pack includes:
  • Draconian_Brass_0
  • Draconian_Brass
  • Draconian_Brass_Spearman
  • Draconian_Brass_Stone
  • Draconian_Brass1
  • Draconian_Brass1_Stone
  • Draconian_Brass2
  • Draconian_Brass2_Stone
  • Draconian_Brass4
  • Draconian_Bronze
  • Draconian_Bronze1
  • Draconian_Bronze2
  • Draconian_copper
  • Draconian_copper1
  • Draconian_copper2
  • Draconian_Gold_0
  • Draconian_Gold
  • Draconian_Gold2
  • Draconian_Gold3
  • Draconian_Hooded_2
  • Draconian_Hooded
  • Draconian_Silver
  • Draconian_Silver2
  • Draconian_Silver3
Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: James Holloway
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and any ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
